title: OpenMCSkins
description: A custom skin loader for Minecraft
body:
# OpenMCSkins
A custom skin loader mod that allows 
players to use skins not only from the official skin system, but also from:

* Local storage
* A custom server that you can [download](https://github.com/zatrit/openmcskins2/tree/main/server) in the GitHub repository
* The ely.by skins, because its API is identical to that used in custom servers
* Optifine capes
* Cloaks+ capes
* LabyMod capes
* MinecraftCapes capes (**even animated!!!**)
* 5ZigReborn capes
* Cosmetica capes
* TLauncher skins
* Mantle capes
* Wynntils capes
* Meteor client capes
* LiquidBounce client capes

#### Dependencies

* [Cloth config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (**for 1.16-1.18**)
* [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (**for 1.19 and above**)

And it all works pretty *fast* because the mod uses **multi-threading**.

*This mod is not affiliated with Mojang, Optifine, LabyMod, MinecraftCapes mod, Cloaks+, TLauncher, ely.by, 5ZigReborn, Mantle, Wynntils, Meteor client, LiquidBounce client or Cosmetica mod*
